rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §37.218 governs school programs on dangers of sharing visual material depicting minors. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative interaction.
quote: Sec. 37.218. PROGRAMS ON DANGERS OF STUDENTS SHARING VISUAL MATERIAL DEPICTING MINOR ENGAGED IN SEXUAL CONDUCT.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and this education safety program statute.
